name: No More Chinese Take-Out
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch scallions, cut into 1 inch pieces
1 teaspoon powdered ginger or 1 tablespoon fresh ginger, chopped
1/4 pound snow peas, fresh or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat an electric wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add the oil and stir in the scallions and garlic.
3. Add the chicken and toss to coat it evenly.
4. Cook for 2-3 minutes. Then add the broccoli or carrots and water.
5. Cover and steam until tender, about 4 minutes.
6. Stir in the vinegar, soy sauce, and ginger.
7. Simmer the mixture for an additional 2 minutes.
8. Add the snow peas and toss to coat. Serve with rice.
Yield: Serves 2 college students
